premise_reconciliation.explanation: The task description reflects a stale snapshot. Between the original auto-tracker round-4 emission (2026-05-16T07:23:03Z, with 19 OPEN / 12 NEEDS_REFINEMENT) and now (2026-05-16T14:41:40Z), the auto-tracker advanced from round 4 to round 56 over ~7 hours, and parallel Phase-5 executor sweeps plus Codex/idea-wizard alignment passes closed every OPEN and NEEDS_REFINEMENT bug-class entry. EXP-061..071 were converted to DEFERRED (remediation-design vehicle; not an unresolved UB proof). The strict-provenance cluster (EXP-020/029/048/049/050) was reclassified OPEN/NEEDS_REFINEMENT -> DEFERRED per phase5_strict_provenance_policy_reclassification.md. The remaining bug-class OPEN entries were either promoted to CONFIRMED_UB via Phase-5 Miri witnesses (e.g. EXP-036, F-A14-D, F-NF20-2/3) or refined/resolved with documented falsification (e.g. EXP-015/016/017/028/030..032/037/052..055/090).
